'''wadodho''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mbalolo|mbalolo]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-d-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mbalolo|mbalolo]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| wadodho
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:wædedheth|wædedheth]] || [[word:wædedhej|wædedhej]] || [[word:wædedhesh|wædedhesh]] || [[word:wædedhe|wædedhe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:wadododhoth|wadododhoth]] || [[word:wadododhoj|wadododhoj]] || [[word:wadododhosh|wadododhosh]] || [[word:wadododho|wadododho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:wadodhoth|wadodhoth]] || [[word:wadodhoj|wadodhoj]] || [[word:wadodhosh|wadodhosh]] || [[word:wadodho|wadodho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:wadofdhoth|wadofdhoth]] || [[word:wadofdhoj|wadofdhoj]] || [[word:wadofdhosh|wadofdhosh]] || [[word:wadofdhof|wadofdhof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:wadodhotho|wadodhotho]] || [[word:wadodhojo|wadodhojo]] || [[word:wadodhosho|wadodhosho]] || [[word:wadodhoko|wadodhoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:wadodhoth|wadodhoth]] || [[word:wadodhoj|wadodhoj]] || [[word:wadodhosh|wadodhosh]] || [[word:wadodho|wadodho]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:wadodhothol|wadodhothol]] || [[word:wadodhojol|wadodhojol]] || [[word:wadodhoshol|wadodhoshol]] || [[word:wadodhokol|wadodhokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:wadodhothotho|wadodhothotho]] || [[word:wadodhojojo|wadodhojojo]] || [[word:wadodhoshosho|wadodhoshosho]] || [[word:wadodhoko|wadodhoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:wadodhothon|wadodhothon]] || [[word:wadodhojon|wadodhojon]] || [[word:wadodhoshon|wadodhoshon]] || [[word:wadodhokon|wadodhokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:wadodhothoro|wadodhothoro]] || [[word:wadodhojoro|wadodhojoro]] || [[word:wadodhoshoro|wadodhoshoro]] || [[word:wadodhokoro|wadodhokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|b863984}}
